steps.title: Use accelerated germination
steps.content: The statement needs graph data showing that a particular H2S treatment was associated with faster germination than no treatment. The best support should compare treated seeds with untreated seeds at the same time and show a higher germination rate for the treated group.

steps.title: Reject weak comparisons
steps.content: Choice A compares the same treated seeds at two different times, not treated versus untreated seeds. Choice C compares groups at 168 hours, when the result does not show acceleration as clearly. Choice D gives a treated value that does not match the graph.

steps.title: Select the treated advantage
steps.content: The remaining choice compares the 10 micromoles per liter treatment with untreated seeds at 48 hours and shows faster germination for the treated seeds. The answer is B.
